user.title: Add a digitalSTROM dSS
user.description: Enter the dSS hostname/IP and an Application Token generated via the dSS web UI (System -> Access -> Authorized Applications).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the dSS at that address.
error.invalid_auth: Application token was rejected by the dSS.

call_scene.name: Call scene
call_scene.description: Trigger a dSS scene by zone + group + scene number.

undo_scene.name: Undo scene
undo_scene.description: Undo the last scene call on a zone+group.
